title: Business Immigration Law | Houston & Austin, TX | Foster LLP
content:
## Business Immigration Lawyers Serving Dallas, Houston & Austin, TX
At Foster LLP, our full-service immigration law firm delivers trusted global immigration services to the most dynamic employers in the United States and worldwide. Whether responding to simple inquiries or developing solutions for the most complex corporate immigration law queries, our attorneys recognize the need for personalized, one-on-one attention. With principal offices located in Austin , Dallas , and Houston , TX, when you work with Foster LLP, you will find that our attorneys listen, anticipate, and adapt to our clients’ needs while employing optimal, tech-led solutions. Our immigration law firm provides a variety of resources including our state-of-the-art I-9 auditing and compliance process, an attorney I-9 client hotline, and a customizable 24/7 case tracking portal. In addition to being experienced I-9 compliance attorneys, we can also help companies in a variety of industries obtain temporary employment or nonimmigrant visas (H-1B visas) for their workforce. An H-1B Visa is the perfect solution for employers who may be seeking to hire nonimmigrants as workers in specialty occupations that require a baccalaureate degree or higher.

### Our Employer Service Offerings Include:
- Work permits and visas worldwide
- Temporary, long-term, and permanent residency options worldwide
- Naturalization to U.S. citizens
- U.S. and global immigration policy development
- Form I-9 and E-Verify advice , consultation and training
- Form I-9 proactive and reactive audits
- U.S. and global immigration compliance audits and training initiatives
- Strategic immigration planning for entry into new markets
- Strategic immigration planning for filling gaps in U.S. and global workforce
- Outer Continental Shelf (OCS) authorizations
- Critical immigration support for mergers and acquisitions
- Litigation representation

### Industries We Service Include:
- Computer Software/Technology
- Energy & Natural Resources
- Religious Organizations/Clergy
- Sports, Professional

## Why Work With an Immigration Attorney?
Navigating the complex landscape of U.S. immigration law requires specialized experience. This area of law can significantly impact your business operations and workforce planning. Working with an experienced immigration attorney provides essential support for employers who would like to hire international talent while maintaining full compliance with federal regulations. Here are some key reasons to consider working with our office:
- Navigating Complex Regulations – Immigration attorneys stay current with frequently changing federal laws, regulations, and policy updates that affect employer obligations and visa processes.
- Streamlined Visa Processing – Professional legal guidance helps expedite H-1B, L-1, O-1, and other employment-based visa applications while avoiding common delays and rejections.
- I-9 Compliance and Audit Protection – Attorneys provide comprehensive Form I-9 training, proactive audits, and representation during government investigations to minimize penalties.
- Strategic Workforce Planning – Immigration lawyers develop long-term strategies for filling critical positions with international talent while planning for permanent residency pathways.
- Risk Mitigation and Liability Protection – Professional legal counsel helps businesses avoid expensive violations, penalties, and potential criminal liability associated with immigration non-compliance.
- Merger and Acquisition Support – Our specialized attorneys provide critical immigration due diligence and workforce transition planning during business transactions.
- Global Mobility Solutions – We can provide comprehensive support for international assignments, work permits, and visa coordination across multiple countries and jurisdictions.
- Litigation and Government Relations – We provide experienced representation during federal audits, investigations, and administrative proceedings to protect your interests.
Working with a qualified immigration attorney helps your business maintain compliance while accessing the global talent necessary for growth and success. Foster LLP’s experienced team provides comprehensive immigration services to employers across Dallas, Houston, Austin, and beyond, delivering personalized solutions for your workforce needs.

## Contact Us for Assistance with Employment Visas
If you’re in need of a business immigration lawyer, depend on our team for quality legal advice. Our lawyers have years of experience in assisting commercial clients with the employment visa process across Houston, Austin, Dallas, TX and the surrounding area. We a range of immigration compliance services including educating managers on proper recordkeeping procedures, reviewing I-9 records, monitoring changes in immigration law changes, developing plans for government requests, and so much more. To learn more about the employment visa process, contact our immigration law firm to request a consultation. We look forward to assisting your company in providing employment visas for your workforce.
- U.S. Temporary Work Visas
- U.S. Permanent Residency
- Work Visas Worldwide
- Form I-9 Audits and Training
- International Travel Letters and Consultation
- International Business Traveler Services
- Merger & Acquisition Immigration Support
- Immigration Program & Policy Development
